rationale: No qualitative escalation in the Russia-Ukraine war or EU energy situation; El Niño confirmation is a distant background risk for Poland; remaining headlines have minimal direct impact on a Polish resident's daily life.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active, raising risk of extreme weather globally including potential disruptions to European agriculture and energy demand.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military action in Lebanon; no direct EU or NATO involvement, but regional instability persists with indirect energy/migration implications.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: China deepening ties with North Korea adds geopolitical complexity to the broader security environment relevant to NATO's eastern flank.
